Insights.Text: Qatar lost the first half - 4/5 Last Matches

Items.Title: Bosnia boost last-32 hopes after win over Qatar
Items.Description: Bosnia-Herzegovina boost their hopes of reaching the knockout stages in the World Cup for a first ever time defeating Qatar in their final Group B fixture.

Items.Title: 'What a moment!' Alajbegovic scores stunning opener for Bosnia
Items.Description: 18-year-old winger Kerim Alajbegovic scores a superb opening goal for Bosnia in their World Cup Group B match against Qatar in Seattle.

Items.Title: Who are ITV's presenters, pundits and commentators for Bosnia vs Qatar?
